text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, as the Tracen Meet draws<n>near, I'm
eating lunch, when...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Mmhmm! Today's carrots are just<n>as yummy
as ever!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'll have some carrot ice cream next<n>and a ton
more carrots for dinner!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hold on, Urara! You can't just gorge<n>yourself on
all those carrots!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Why not? This is how much I<n>normally eat!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You're always like this...You could at least try to live up toyour role as the roommate of afirst-rate Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That's true! There's a whole bunch I<n>can learn
from you, King! You're, like,<n>super-duper
awesome!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ahem... I'll admit that your eye fortalent is almost first-rate.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
However! It is precisely because<n>you're so
close to greatness that you<n>must be more
conscious of your body<n>mass!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Body... math?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Body mass. If we are to stay infirst-rate condition, we need to beconscious of our weight as well.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And yet! Despite the Tracen Meet<n>being right
around the corner, you're<n>feasting on carrots
with abandon!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Mmm... I guess you're probably right,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I always feel better when I eat the<n>food I love!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Even if I work on my body math, I<n>can't run well
if I don't feel good!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What are we going to dowith you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Though I suppose there's something<n>to admire
in your carefree attitude.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, I'm still a bit worried. So,<n>how about
we...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... King, wait formeeee!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely not. I have given you the<n>privilege of
training with me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't be lazy. We're going to run till<n>you burn
off every calorie.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah. If you're here with me, then<n>I'm gonna
try my best!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! Now, keep your<n>head up and
dash forward!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay! Head up!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: URARARARARAAAA!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You dummy! I didn't say look up at<n>the sky!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After that, the two racers continue to<n>joyfully run
about, right up until track<n>closing time.
